# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

Resources:
    MyVpc:
        Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::VPC
        Properties:
            CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16" # or any other valid IP range for your VPC, e.g., 172.31.0.0/16 (for example)
        
    PublicSubnetA:
        Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Subnet
        Properties:
            CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24" # or any other valid IP range for your public subnets, e.g., 172.31.1.0/24 (for example)
        
    PublicSubnetB:
        Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Subnet
        Properties:
            CidrBlock: "10.0.2.0/24" # or any other valid IP range for your public subnets, e.g., 172.31.2.0/24 (for example)        
    
    PrivateSubnetA:
        Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Subnet
        Properties:
            CidrBlock: "10.0.3.0/24" # or any other valid IP range for your private subnets, e.g., 172.31.3.0/24 (for example)        
    
    PrivateSubnetB:
        Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Subnet
        Properties:
            CidrBlock: "10.0.4.0/24" # or any other valid IP range for your private subnets, e.g., 172.31.4.0/24 (for example)        
    
    InternetGateway:
        Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
            
    PublicRouteTableAssociationPublicSubnetAtoVPC:
       Type : 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'  # Subnets to Route Tables association.  
         Properties: { "subnetId" : {"Ref": "PrivateSubnetB"}, }   
     PublicRouteTablePublicGatewayToInternetFacingVPC:       Type:'AWS::EC2::Route',      DependsOn:"EIP",Properties:->{  DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0' , RouteTableId : { "Ref" : "PrivateSubnetBPublicRoutes"} }
     PublicRouteTableAssociationPublicGatewayToInternetFacingVPC-EIPIngressRuleSetInboundHTTPTraffictoPort80:  Type:'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup', Properties:->{ GroupName:/ec2/http, Protocol:@(tcp|udp), FromPort@('^4567$'), ToPort(@'1337') }
     PublicRouteTablePublicGatewayToInternetFacingVPC-EIPIngressRuleSetInboundHTTPTraffictoPrivateSubnetB:  Type:'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup', Properties:->{ GroupName:/ec2/http, Protocol:@(tcp|udp), FromPort@('^4567$'), ToPort(@'1338') }
     PublicRouteTablePublicGatewayToInternetFacingVPC-EIPIngressRuleSetInboundHTTPTraffictoPrivateSubnetA:  Type:'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup', Properties:->{ GroupName:/ec2/http, Protocol:@(tcp|udp), FromPort@('^4567$'), ToPort(@'1339') }
     PublicRouteTablePublicGatewayToInternetFacingVPC-EIPIngressRuleSetInboundHTTPTraffictoPrivateSubnetA:  Type:'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup', Properties:->{ GroupName:/ec2/http, Protocol:@(tcp|udp), FromPort@('^4567$'), ToPort(@'1340') }
